channel.title: Scroll up when reloading the page.
channel.description:
I am new at this. I just created a theme with Frontity, everything works fine. Only when I scroll down a "post" or a "page" and reload the page, it appears where I reloaded. That is to say, if I go to the middle of a "post" and reload the page, it does not appear at the top, but it appears in the middle of the "post".
I have not added settings or actions other than what Frontity installs. And in the frontity.setting.js file just change the url as explained in the guide. For this reason I don't understand if this is the usual behavior of the theme or what I can do so that every time I reload a page it appears from the beginning (scroll up).

item.title: Scroll up when reloading the page.
item.dc:creator: danielmirongarcia100
item.description:
I am new at this. I just created a theme with Frontity, everything works fine. Only when I scroll down a “post” or a “page” and reload the page, it appears where I reloaded. That is to say, if I go to the middle of a “post” and reload the page, it does not appear at the top, but it appears in the middle of the “post”.

I have not added settings or actions other than what Frontity installs. And in the frontity.setting.js file just change the url as explained in the guide. For this reason I don’t understand if this is the usual behavior of the theme or what I can do so that every time I reload a page it appears from the beginning (scroll up).

Read full topic
item.source: Scroll up when reloading the page.
